questions.question: What is the main purpose of Claude?
options: To replace all software development tools
To act as an AI assistant that helps with tasks such as writing, reasoning, coding, and analysis
To store files permanently in the cloud
questions.explanation: Claude is an AI assistant designed to help users with language, reasoning, coding, analysis, and related knowledge work tasks.

questions.question: Which learning activity best matches the purpose of Mnemoloop?
options: Reading notes once and moving on
Practicing recall repeatedly so knowledge becomes easier to remember
questions.explanation: Mnemoloop is built around active recall and reinforcement, so repeated practice is more important than passive reading.
